channel.title: Agentic on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Defense at AI speed: Microsoft’s new multi-model agentic security system tops leading industry benchmark
item.description:
Microsoft announced MDASH, a new multi-model agentic scanning harness for AI-powered cyber defense. The post says it topped a leading industry benchmark, but provides no technical details in the excerpt.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: github: Copilot code review now runs on an agentic architecture
item.description:
GitHub Copilot code review has moved to an agentic, tool-calling architecture and is now generally available.

  • Source: GitHub
